THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BITTING, JOHN P. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, ART, JR. OLD DOMINION FREIGHT LINE INC., A VIRGINIA CORP. $2,442.50 PRINCIPAL, $86.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,528.50, SEE ATTACHED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

IT IS SO ORDERED THAT THE JUDGMENT BE AMENDED TO REFLECT ADDITIONAL COST OF $54 NOT INCLUDED AS PART OF PROCESS SERVING FEES. NUNC PRO TUNC.
